description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 4 hrs 13 mins coding, with a daily average of 3 hrs 5 mins. His work was spread across 5 projects, with most of the time in TypeScript, along with Java, Markdown, JSON, and other languages. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded this week.
